title: Kusibabella fastor
taxonomy: Kusibabella fastor is currently classified as a member of the plant family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification is based on its shared characteristics with other plants within this family, such as its flower structure and growth habits. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of Kusibabella fastor. However, its placement within the Asteraceae family suggests that it may be related to other flowering plants that produce similar types of flowers. More studies are required to determine the specific classification and relationships of Kusibabella fastor within the plant kingdom.
